summary: Bridged spec assessment passed after binding the change to docs/cleave-dirty-tree-checkpointing.md and reconciling tasks.md with the implemented preflight workflow.

constraints: Non-volatile dirty trees require interactive input to resolve; in non-interactive contexts runDirtyTreePreflight throws instead of auto-selecting an action (extensions/cleave/index.ts:297-303).

Cleave now enforces two clean-state guards: preflight before worktree setup and a second git status --porcelain check immediately before child dispatch, aborting if the repo became dirty after preflight (extensions/cleave/index.ts:1838-1857, extensions/cleave/dispatcher.ts:435-445).
